name: quant_change qint8 scale only
description: qint8 [4] re-quantized: scale 0.1→1.0, zero_point unchanged (0). Decoder reads new scale + zp + data block; replaces tensor.

name: quant_change qint8 scale and zero_point
description: qint8 [3] re-quantized: scale 0.5→0.25, zero_point 0→5. Negative data [-20,0,20] stays int8 range.

name: quant_change qfp8 scale (no zero_point field)
description: qfp8 [4] re-quantized: scale 0.1→0.5. Wire carries no zero_point for qfp8; decoder must not read a zp byte.

name: quant_change qint4 scale and negative zero_point
description: qint4 [4] re-quantized: scale 0.1→0.2, zero_point 0→-1 (signed nibble on wire).
